details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest Bride-Only on-site package under $220 for Saturday morning
Task 2: Choose stylist with lower San Francisco travel fee among top-rated options
Task 3: Build bride + 3 bridesmaids in-salon booking under $650
Task 4: Schedule weekday evening bridal hair trial under $100 in August 2025
Task 5: Save long-hair updo styles with veils to favorites
Task 6: Send contact form question about cancellations >30 days before wedding
Task 7: Add a $150 digital bridal gift card to the shopping cart
Task 8: Submit a destination wedding quote request for a Maui event
Task 9: Save two recommended 2025 trend hairstyles (braided + accessories) to favorites
